name: claude-code-browser
description: Native messaging host (local Node.js bridge) for the Claude Code Browser Chrome extension. Bridges Chrome and your existing Claude Code CLI over Chrome's native messaging API so a Claude Code agent session can navigate, screenshot, snapshot the DOM and pick elements from pages open in your browser. Spawns a local @anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk session that reuses your existing Claude Code authentication (no extra account or API key) and exposes browser tools to the agent over MCP. Ships with the bundled /browse skill and an installer that wires up the native-messaging manifest, registers the host with Chrome, and installs the skill into your Claude Code config. Companion package — not a standalone Claude Code. Developed by Fineguide.AI (Corneliu Maftuleac).

scripts.build: tsc && chmod 755 dist/host.js dist/install.js && echo '{"type":"module"}' > dist/package.json
